title: LifeSmart COLO GCS LS608
description:
The COLO GCS redefines gaming audio with its 7.1.2 surround sound and Dolby Atmos technology. Featuring 11 independent speaker units, including a top-mounted overhead speaker and a powerful subwoofer, it delivers precise 3D audio for an immersive experience in games, movies, and music.
With tailored sound modes, compatibility across devices, and an integrated space-saving design, the GCS seamlessly fits into your setup. Combining innovative features with easy installation, it is the ideal choice for gamers and entertainment enthusiasts seeking premium audio performance.
Certificate: CE/UL./FCC | Adapter: CN/UK/US/EU | Packaging: English | EAN: 6932046206006 | HS code: 8518220000 | Package size: 1PCS/CTN
G.W:7.5KGS
CTN size:73*70*19cm
